name: Kuraudia Holdings Co.,Ltd.
summary: Kuraudia Holdings Co.,Ltd. engages in the planning, manufacturing, and sale of wedding costumes in Japan and internationally. The company offers wedding dresses, tuxedos, and bridal inners, as well as rents wedding costumes. It also operates a costume salon; and operates and manages a wedding hall. The company was formerly known as KURAUDIA Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Kuraudia Holdings Co.,Ltd. in September 2017. Kuraudia Holdings Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1976 and is headquartered in Kyoto, Japan.
